ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: A message sent in the live chat during a video.

videoId.description: The ID of the video the chat belongs to.

userId.description: The UID of the user who sent the message.

userName.description: The display name of the user.

userAvatar.description: The avatar URL of the user.

Video.title: Video
Video.description: A video uploaded by a user.

videoUrl.description: The URL of the video file in Storage.

thumbnail.description: The URL of the thumbnail image.

userId.description: The UID of the user who uploaded the video.

channelId.description: The ID of the channel the video belongs to.

channelAvatar.description: The avatar URL of the channel.

subscribers.description: The number of subscribers of the channel.

qualities.description: Map of quality labels to URLs.

Subscription.title: Subscription
Subscription.description: A channel subscription for a user.

userId.description: The UID of the user who is subscribing.

channelId.description: The ID of the channel being subscribed to.

channelName.description: The name of the channel being subscribed to.

Channel.title: Channel
Channel.description: Customization data for a user's channel.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns the channel.

avatarUrl.description: The avatar URL of the channel.

bannerUrl.description: The URL of the channel banner image.

updatedAt.description: When the channel data was last updated.

/videos/{videoId}/chat.description: Collection of chat messages for a specific video.
